name: RYan45
review:
LiveTaste has changed my life.

I have struggled with class 3 obesity my whole life, and alongside that, depression. As long as I can remember I have been attempting to lose weight. I tried every diet there is, Keto, no sugar, vegetarian, carnivore. I even began to use peptides like Ozmpic and Retatrutide, but still the appetite suppressants couldn't suppress the need for the sensation of eating.

All hope was lost for me until I discovered LiveTaste. When I heard about their brain hijacking pads I needed to try! At first I was sceptical, but as soon as I tried the first flavour in the package I was shocked. It felt like I was eating even though nothing was in my mouth.

I have now lost 45 kg, and I am the happiest I have ever been.

name: McDock566
review:
DO NOT BUY.

I purchased LiveTaste pads and the taste is extremely weak. I have also noticed strange hard lumps on my temples. This company is a scam DO NOT BUY!!!

name: RoseMom254
review: I purchased LiveTaste for my daughter and she can't stop using them! She hasn't eaten in weeks!!!! I only wanted my daughter to lose a bit of weight but now she's lost too much!!!! 🤬🤬 I tried complaining to customer service but apparently they can't give refunds!!! Horrendous!!! Never buying from this company again 🤬🤬🤬🤬🤬🤬🤬🤬🤬🤬🤬🤬
